test.name: Analyze the identity conflict (c_002)
test.description: An identity conflict asks whether the Patrick Flynn in one record is the same person as the Patrick Flynn in another. Different analytical shape from fact conflicts — one competing assertion rather than multiple, and the question is identity rather than which value is correct.

input.user_message: Analyze identity conflict c_002 and either resolve it or flag what additional evidence would be needed.

judge_context: Should treat c_002 as an identity question (is record A's subject the same person as record B's subject) rather than as a fact disagreement
Should note that an identity conflict can have only 1 competing_assertion_id — the assertion whose person-link is uncertain — unlike fact conflicts which need ≥2

If the skill can't resolve from available evidence, it should write what evidence would be decisive (e.g., a third corroborating record, age trajectory across censuses, naming patterns) rather than picking a winner arbitrarily
